creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
Update texmacs to 1.0.7.21
* fix build with clang
* use new LIB_DEPENDS syntax
* add LICENSE
* USE_GMAKE -> USES=gmake
* use stage
* removed post-install chown
* workaround linking with clang (LLVM bug 13992)
* replace share/TeXmacs with %%DATADIR%% in pkg-plist

Fix: 

redports build:

https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140212022500-64439/
https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140212023424-47689/

patch file too big, so I put it here:

http://henryhu.net/texmacs.txt
